hero.title: Where Does a Project Begin?
hero.subtitle: A conscious way of shopping, born in Schio and brought to Japan.
hero.body: èSenza was founded in Schio, in the province of Vicenza, as a bulk shopping concept combined with the selection of small Italian producers. Today, its prepared mixes bring a simple, authentic, and sustainable Italian culinary experience to your kitchen.

features.title: Without Waste. Without Excess. With Real Taste.
features.subtitle: A selection guided by transparency, clear supply chains, small producers, and careful attention to environmental impact.

products.title: Prepared Mixes from Italy
products.subtitle: Jarred recipes made with certified organic ingredients, designed for simple preparation at home.

hero.title: The Story of èSenza
hero.subtitle: A family project built around quality, care, and conscious choices.
hero.body: èSenza was founded on February 15, 2021, from an idea by Ornella: to create a space where products would be good for those who buy them, fair for those who produce them, and gentle on the environment. A few months later, Martina joined the project, turning it into a family business built day by day with care, dialogue, and a strong bond between generations.

mission.title: Good for People, Fair for Producers, Gentle on the Environment
mission.body: The project developed around a shared passion: the pursuit of quality, respect for seasonality, and support for small artisan producers who often struggle to find space in large-scale retail. For èSenza, telling their stories is just as important as offering their products.
mission.feature1Sub: Products chosen through transparency, quality, and clear supply chains.
mission.feature2Sub: A daily commitment to reducing packaging, waste, pollution, and exploitation.

origin.title: Here We Are
origin.body: We are Ornella and Martina — the heart and soul of èSenza. The project began with Ornella’s desire to create a place dedicated to small producers, seasonality, refill culture, and conscious choices. Martina joined a few months later, leaving her previous job to fully believe in the project and help transform it into a family business with a wider vision.

philosophy.title: Founders & Vision
philosophy.card1Body: Deeply connected to simple living, nature, evening reading, and genuine products, Ornella created èSenza from the desire to give value to small producers and to offer a more conscious way of shopping.
philosophy.card2Body: Martina joined the project in May 2021, choosing to leave her previous job and become a partner in every sense. Her contribution helped turn èSenza into a family business built with care, dialogue, and shared responsibility.
philosophy.card3Body: Together, Ornella and Martina want èSenza to remain a place where quality, transparency, sustainability, and human relationships come before speed, excess, and anonymous consumption.

quote.text: We like to believe that, through our work, we can contribute — even in our own small way — to a more conscious, kinder, and more respectful world.
quote.author: Ornella Trevisan & Martina Sartore

hero.title: How It Works
hero.subtitle: Each mix is designed to be simple to use while leaving room for the pleasure of cooking.
hero.subtitleJa: Inside each jar, you will find organic ingredients already measured and combined according to our recipe.

process.title: Add, Mix, Cook, Enjoy
process.titleJa: A Simple Way to Cook with Care
process.subtitle: To complete each recipe, you only need a few fresh ingredients — such as water, oil, eggs, or milk.

steps.step1TitleJa: Choose the recipe you want to prepare
steps.step1Body: Select from èSenza’s prepared mixes, including cakes, cookies, bread, pizza, and soup.
steps.step1BodyJa: Each jar contains a base of organic ingredients, already measured and combined according to the recipe.
steps.step2TitleJa: Complete the recipe with a few fresh ingredients
steps.step2Body: Add what is needed — such as water, oil, eggs, milk, or butter — following the instructions included with the product.
steps.step2BodyJa: Each product includes clear step-by-step instructions to guide you through preparation.
steps.step3Title: Let the Recipe Come to Life
steps.step3Body: Add the ingredients, mix carefully, and let time do the rest.
steps.step3BodyJa: With just a few simple steps, cooking becomes once again a moment of attention, calm, and care.

shipping.title: From Italy to Your Kitchen
shipping.subtitle: Prepared mixes designed to bring authentic Italian flavors abroad in a clear, simple, and transparent way.
shipping.tempBody: Each product includes clear step-by-step instructions. Add the ingredients, mix carefully, and let the recipe come to life with just a few simple steps.

hero.title: Shop èSenza Mixes
hero.subtitle: Jarred recipes made with certified organic ingredients, created to bring authentic Italian cooking into everyday life.
hero.subtitleJa: Simple, transparent, and high-quality products designed for international consumers.

newsletter.title: Join the èSenza Way

product.sustainabilityBody: Each jar contains a base of organic ingredients, already measured and combined according to èSenza’s recipe. The project follows a zero-waste approach rooted in transparency, clear supply chains, and environmental care.

footer.tagline: A conscious way of shopping, with Italian organic mixes made simple.

newsletter.title: Join the èSenza Family
newsletter.subtitle: Get recipes, stories from small producers, sustainability ideas, and exclusive updates straight to your inbox.
